context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct per-channel message limits for single vs multi-channel fetch, batches channel lists at 500 per call, sorts merged results by timetoken using BigInt, and documents the per-channel ordering guarantee.

checklist.name: Channel batch size 500
checklist.description: splitChannelBatches defaults to or uses 500 as the per-call maximum number of channels

checklist.name: Splits oversized channel lists
checklist.description: fetchAndMerge actually invokes splitChannelBatches and runs one fetchMessages call per batch when the channel list exceeds the batch size

checklist.name: Tags messages with source channel
checklist.description: mergeAndSort adds a 'channel' (or equivalent) property to each message indicating which channel it came from

checklist.name: Sort by timetoken with BigInt
checklist.description: Sort comparison uses BigInt(a.timetoken) and BigInt(b.timetoken), not Number() or string compare, to preserve 17-digit precision

checklist.name: Ascending timetoken order
checklist.description: Merged array is sorted ascending by timetoken (oldest first)

checklist.name: Handles missing channel keys
checklist.description: mergeAndSort tolerates channels with no messages in the response (treats undefined/missing as an empty array)

checklist.name: Per-channel ordering comment
checklist.description: Includes a comment or docstring near mergeAndSort that states PubNub guarantees per-channel ordering only and that cross-channel ordering must be reassembled client-side

checklist.name: Uses start (or end) for sinceTimetoken
checklist.description: fetchMultiChannel passes sinceTimetoken to fetchMessages as start or end, not as an unrelated parameter
